reason: Global importance alone does not establish direction, thresholds, or conditional behavior. This round characterized binned SHAP effects and identified the strongest contribution co-movement pair as {'feature_1': 'Elevation__Low', 'feature_2': 'Elevation', 'spearman_shap_comovement': 0.42597443989775957}. The final round tests whether these explanations remain stable under permutation, perturbation, and SHAP resampling.
